title: Mid-Sem Exam Schedule Released
body: Mid-semester examinations will commence from 10 March 2026. Detailed date sheets are available on the college portal and department notice boards.

title: Fee Submission Deadline
body: Last date for fee submission is 5 March 2026. A late fee penalty of Rs. 50/day will be applicable after the due date. Pay at the accounts office or online via the college portal.

title: Annual College Fest — Registrations Open
body: Registrations for the Annual College Fest 2026 are now open. Last date to register is 28 February. Visit the Student Affairs office or register online.

title: Scholarship Forms Available
body: Scholarship application forms are available at the admin office. Eligibility: 60%+ marks in previous semester. Last date for submission: 28 February 2026.

title: TCS Campus Drive — CSE & IT
body: TCS will be conducting a campus recruitment drive on 5 March 2026. Eligible branches: CSE and IT. Register at the placement cell by 1 March.

title: Guest Lecture — AI & Machine Learning
body: A guest lecture on AI and Machine Learning will be held on 25 February 2026 in the Seminar Hall at 10 AM. All CSE, IT, and MCA students are encouraged to attend.

title: Library Book Return Reminder
body: Students with overdue books are requested to return them by 28 February to avoid fines. Check your due dates on the library portal.

title: Sports Day — Registration Open
body: Annual Sports Day will be held on 10 March 2026. Register for events (cricket, basketball, athletics, badminton) at the sports office by 5 March.
